action_on_breach: halve position size (regime brake) until equity recovers above the -8% line
notes: US (S&P 500) Q-Open baseline. Same Medallion-style discipline as the SET book but UNPROVEN on US (see /us-evidence) — start small, paper/tiny-size until it earns its track record. Board lot = 1 share. Under $25k mind the PDT rule (see /us-risk). Tune to real account capital.
